stories.title: Add barrel index.ts exports for lib, routes, middleware, admin modules
stories.description: Create barrel index.ts files that re-export public APIs for: src/worker/lib/index.ts, src/worker/routes/index.ts, src/worker/middleware/index.ts, src/worker/admin/index.ts (rename existing admin/index.ts to admin/app.ts first, then create barrel). Update imports in consumer files to use barrel imports instead of deep ../../ paths. Only change imports that are 3+ levels deep.
stories.last_error: TIMEOUT — agent did not complete within 600s (barrel creation done but import rewriting incomplete)
acceptance_criteria: Deep relative imports (../../) reduced by at least 50%

stories.title: Add rollback SQL scripts to D1 migrations
stories.description: For each of the 8 existing migration files in migrations/, create a corresponding rollback (down) SQL file. Name pattern: if migration is 0001_create_table.sql, rollback is 0001_create_table.down.sql. Each rollback reverses the migration (DROP TABLE, ALTER TABLE DROP COLUMN, etc.). Read each migration first to understand what it creates.
acceptance_criteria: Each rollback reverses the corresponding migration

stories.title: Add try/catch to high-traffic async handlers
stories.description: Add explicit try/catch error handling to these route handlers that currently rely only on the global error handler: telegram.ts (52% coverage), weekly.ts (41%), whatsapp.ts (66%), blog.ts, upload.ts, sitemap.ts. Catch errors, log with structuredLog, and return appropriate error responses. Do NOT change handlers that already have try/catch.

unit: telegram handler catches and logs errors gracefully
whatsapp handler returns 500 on unexpected error

stories.title: Add DI factories for sanityClient, alerter, domainIntel
stories.description: Create factory functions following the createRateLimiter/createClassifier pattern: createSanityClient(env) in lib/sanity.ts, createAlerter(env) in lib/alerter.ts, createDomainIntel(env) in lib/domain-intel.ts. Each factory takes env bindings and returns a configured instance. Update callers to use the factory. Do NOT change function signatures — wrap existing functions.
acceptance_criteria: createSanityClient factory exists and is used
createAlerter factory exists and is used
createDomainIntel factory exists and is used

stories.title: Improve test coverage for telegram, weekly, whatsapp routes
stories.description: Add tests to increase branch coverage: telegram.ts (52%→75%), weekly.ts (41%→65%), whatsapp.ts (66%→80%). Focus on uncovered branches identified in coverage report. Check existing test files first — extend them, don't create duplicates.
acceptance_criteria: npx vitest run --coverage shows improved branch coverage
stories.last_error: TIMEOUT — agent did not complete within 300s (retry with 600s timeout)
